evidence.page_title: McDonald's restaurant burns from Eaton Fire in Pasadena, California
evidence.title: WATCH: McDonald's restaurant burns as Eaton Fire spreads in Pasadena, California
evidence.description: High winds drove rapid growth of the Eaton Fire in Pasadena, California, posing a significant threat to nearby communities and making containment efforts challenging. A McDonald's restaurant was among the buildings engulfed in the inferno.

evidence.page_title: Hollywood firefighters battle dramatic car blaze at McDonald's drive ...
evidence.title: Hollywood firefighters battle dramatic car blaze at McDonald’s drive-thru
evidence.description: Shocking video captures firefighters as they extinguish an unoccupied car engulfed in flames at a Hollywood McDonald’s on State Road 7. The fire, which also scorched nearby trees, left the vehicle completely destroyed but caused no injuries.
evidence.text:
Hollywood firefighters battle dramatic car blaze at McDonald’s drive-thru
Shocking video captures firefighters as they extinguish an unoccupied car engulfed in flames at a Hollywood McDonald’s on State Road 7. The fire, which also scorched nearby trees, left the vehicle completely destroyed but caused no injuries.

evidence.title: McDonald's restaurant engulfed in flames in California wildfire | Fox Business Video
